name: Maldives Paradise
summary: Stunning island getaway with crystal clear waters
description: The Maldives is a tropical paradise known for its white sandy beaches, crystal-clear turquoise waters, and luxurious overwater bungalows.

name: Swiss Alps Adventure
summary: Breathtaking mountain views and adventure sports
description: Experience the majestic Swiss Alps with world-class skiing, hiking trails, and charming mountain villages.

name: Bali Cultural Experience
summary: Rich culture, beautiful temples, and tropical beaches
description: Bali offers a unique blend of stunning beaches, ancient temples, lush rice terraces, and vibrant culture.

name: Dubai Luxury Escape
description: Dubai is a city of superlatives with the world's tallest building, largest shopping malls, and most luxurious hotels.

name: Santorini Greece
summary: Iconic white buildings and stunning sunsets
description: Santorini is famous for its whitewashed buildings with blue domes, dramatic cliffs, and spectacular sunsets.

name: Tokyo Japan
summary: Blend of tradition and futuristic technology
description: Tokyo seamlessly blends ancient temples with neon-lit skyscrapers. Experience world-class cuisine and cutting-edge technology.

name: New York City Escape
summary: Skyscrapers, Times Square, and Central Park
description: Explore the energy of New York City with visits to Times Square, Central Park, Broadway, and the Statue of Liberty. Perfect for first‑time visitors and urban explorers.

name: Kerala Backwaters
description: Relax on a traditional houseboat as you cruise through the serene backwaters of Kerala, surrounded by coconut trees, villages, and peaceful canals.

name: Paris City of Lights
description: Discover Paris with its iconic Eiffel Tower, charming streets, world‑class museums, and cozy cafés along the Seine. Ideal for couples and culture lovers.

name: Sydney Coastal Adventure
summary: Opera House, beaches, and coastal walks
description: Visit the Sydney Opera House, Bondi Beach, and scenic coastal walks while enjoying vibrant food, culture, and Australia’s laid‑back lifestyle.
